import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let words = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut token_list: List<String> = []
  mut count_list: List<Int> = []

  mut i = 0
  while i < words.len()
    let word = match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end

    mut found_idx = -1
    mut j = 0
    while j < token_list.len()
      let t = match token_list.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        ""
      end
      if t == word
        found_idx = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end

    if found_idx == -1
      token_list = list.push(token_list, word)
      count_list = list.push(count_list, 1)
    else
      mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
      mut k = 0
      while k < count_list.len()
        let c = match count_list.get(k)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if k == found_idx
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c + 1)
        else
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c)
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      count_list = new_counts
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0
  mut m = 0
  while m < token_list.len()
    let tok = match token_list.get(m)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    let cnt = match count_list.get(m)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if cnt > best_count
      best_token = tok
      best_count = cnt
    end
    m = m + 1
  end

  print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
  Ok(())
end
